text: Hi, my name is Meghan, and I'm with AutoCare. Please press "B" and I confirm you are not a telemarketer. Maybe overpaying for your auto insurance, and we want to help you find a better rate. Just to make sure the marketing calls are not accepted. May I ask? Please add this name and number to the viewer. Do not call this.
